arts.ttl: Man United eye-up Ajax wonderkid dubbed 'the next Jude Bellingham' - as Red Devils get set to target young stars with high potential this summer
arts.sum: SIMON JONES: Manchester United are limited budget wise to what they can do at first team level this summer with a lot depending on who they can sell.

arts.ttl: Preview: Willem II vs. Ajax - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's Eredivisie clash between Willem II and Ajax, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
